resources.string: Notice yourself, one week at a time
Pressure is not a daily verdict. This view keeps only your recent weekly change and current level.
Complete this week’s reflection to generate a score
Each point is one week. Mindfulness completion and reflection are combined.
Your trend starts after the first weekly reflection.
Use ten questions to understand the week, then bring your attention back with a quiet practice.
Review sleep, attention, relationships, surroundings and physical signals across the past week.
Soothing music plays after you start. Leaving or switching apps marks the practice interrupted.
Today is not a planned practice day. Start next on Monday, Wednesday, Friday, or Sunday.
There are no perfect answers. Choose what most closely reflects the past seven days.
Your answers and mindfulness completion will form this week’s pressure score.

string-array.name: assessment_questions
string-array.item: How would you describe your sleep quality over the past week?
Did you pick up your phone and switch repeatedly between apps?
How did you respond to different views or unexpected change?
Did a significant stressful event happen this week?
How were your surroundings and personal care?
How was your work or study state?
How did contact with family and friends feel?
Did you experience persistent tension, headaches, palpitations, or appetite changes?
Could you make time for interests, movement, or simple rest?
Could you stop and rest despite unfinished tasks?

string-array.name: assessment_sleep_options
string-array.item: Urgent change; daily life is affected

string-array.name: assessment_views_options
string-array.item: Strongly resistant and kept replaying it

string-array.name: assessment_environment_options
string-array.item: Often lacked energy to care for things

string-array.name: assessment_work_options
string-array.item: Could hardly begin or sustain basics

string-array.name: assessment_relationship_options
string-array.item: Reduced contact and sometimes avoided it
Clearly avoided contact or felt isolated

string-array.name: assessment_recovery_options
string-array.item: Could not stop or lost interest

string-array.name: assessment_worry_options
string-array.item: Could accept unfinished work and rest
Sometimes thought about it, then let go
Often replayed it and struggled to stop
Persistent worry made rest nearly impossible

resources.string: The current screen will be pinned. Leaving the app interrupts this record.
Practice complete. Thank you for keeping this time for yourself.
You left the app, so this practice was not completed.
Practice ended early and does not count toward this week.
Only notification permission is needed for mindfulness reminders. Everything else stays local.
Every Mon, Wed, Fri and Sun
Only used on practice days. No usage or location access.
NeuroTrack supports self-observation and mindfulness only. It does not provide medical diagnosis or treatment. Seek professional help if distress persists or you may harm yourself.
Practice reminders every Monday, Wednesday, Friday and Sunday.
Keep a quiet moment for yourself
Today is a mindfulness day. Start a focused practice when you are ready.
